---
title: "Workshop 02 — Day 2"
subtitle: "Transect Surveys, Data Entry & Validation"
date: 2024-06-02
---

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00 - 09:30 | Recap & Field Data Review | John Smith |
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Transect Survey Practice | Jane Doe |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break | |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | Data Entry and Validation | John Smith |

## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Slides

[View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

## R Code

```{.r filename="analysis.R"}
library(tidyverse)

# Validate field entries
df <- read_csv("field_data.csv")

df |>
  filter(is.na(species) | is.na(count)) |>
  nrow()  # should be 0 after cleaning

df |>
  distinct(site) |>
  arrange(site)
```

[Download R Script](analysis.R){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Reference Document

<iframe src="reference.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](reference.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
